creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Untangling Chromium, much less fixing a bug in ordering, is extremely complex and needs to be fixed by an upstream. I'm not sure whether this is a problem with Samurai or Chromium.

You should definitely report it to both upstreams. Past that, there's not much I can do. I wish I had a better answer for you than "I agree that sucks," but that's all I got.
